inputs.label: Travel Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total linear distance to be covered during the transition

businessContext_i18n.en: Total linear distance to be covered during the transition
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçiş sırasında katedilecek toplam doğrusal mesafe
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte lineare Strecke, die während des Übergangs zurückgelegt wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance linéaire totale à parcourir pendant la transition

inputs.label: Acceleration Capability
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceleration the system can achieve

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceleration the system can achieve
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Beschleunigung, die das System erreichen kann
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération maximale que le système peut atteindre

inputs.label: Max Velocity Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum velocity the system can sustain

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum velocity the system can sustain
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Geschwindigkeit, die das System aufrechterhalten kann
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse maximale que le système peut maintenir

inputs.label: Pre-Motion Delay
inputs.businessContext: Delay before motion starts (e.g., signal processing, grip activation)

businessContext_i18n.en: Delay before motion starts (e.g., signal processing, grip activation)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hareket başlamadan önceki gecikme (örn. sinyal işleme, tutucu aktivasyonu)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verzögerung vor Bewegungsbeginn (z. B. Signalverarbeitung, Greiferaktivierung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai avant le début du mouvement (ex. traitement du signal, activation de la pince)

inputs.label: Post-Motion Settling Time
inputs.businessContext: Time required after reaching position for stabilization (vibration, settling)

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required after reaching position for stabilization (vibration, settling)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pozisyona ulaştıktan sonra stabilizasyon için gereken süre (titreşim, yerleşme)
businessContext_i18n.de: Erforderliche Zeit nach Erreichen der Position zur Stabilisierung (Vibration, Beruhigung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire après avoir atteint la position pour la stabilisation (vibrations, mise en place)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
